mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, POST_ID, FILE_NM, PATH, SIZE, EXT, SORT_SEQ, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN FROM TB_FILE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ ASC, REG_DTTM ASC
SELECT FILE_ID, POST_ID, FILE_NM, PATH, SIZE, EXT, SORT_SEQ, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN FROM TB_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_FILE ( FILE_ID, POST_ID, FILE_NM, PATH, SIZE, EXT, SORT_SEQ, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{postId}, #{fileNm}, #{path}, #{size}, #{ext}, #{sortSeq}, #{regDttm}, #{regUser}, #{regIp}, #{updDttm}, #{updUser}, #{updIp}, 'N', 'Y' )
